| MCP:PMCFHr | {

| MCP:PMCFHr |     "build:stage": "vue-cli-service build --mode staging",
| MCP:PMCFHr |     "svgo": "svgo -f src/icons/svg --config=src/icons/svgo.yml",

| MCP:PMCFHr |   },

| MCP:PMCFHr | # vue3-admin-template
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | English | [简体中文](./README-zh.md)
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | > A minimal vue admin template with Element UI & axios & iconfont & permission control & lint
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | **Live demo:** https://HaitaoWang555.github.io/vue3-admin-template
| MCP:PMCFHr | **Live demo:** http://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-template
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | **Pro Live demo:** https://haitaowang555.github.io/vue3-admin-pro
| MCP:PMCFHr | **Pro Live demo:** https://wanghaitao555.gitee.io/vue3-admin-pro
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ## Build Setup
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```bash
| MCP:PMCFHr | # clone the project
| MCP:PMCFHr | git clone https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template.git
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # enter the project directory
| MCP:PMCFHr | cd vue-admin-template
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # install pnpm
| MCP:PMCFHr | npm i -g pnpm
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # install dependency
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm install
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # develop
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm dev
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | This will automatically open http://localhost:9528
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ## Build
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```bash
| MCP:PMCFHr | # build for test environment
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm build:stage
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # build for production environment
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm build:prod
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ## Advanced
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```bash
| MCP:PMCFHr | # preview the release environment effect
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm preview
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # preview the release environment effect + static resource analysis
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm preview -- --report
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # code format check
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm lint
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # code format check and auto fix
| MCP:PMCFHr | pnpm lint -- --fix
| MCP:PMCFHr | ```
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | ## License
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | [MIT](https://github.com/HaitaoWang555/vue3-admin-template/blob/master/LICENSE) license.
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | Copyright (c) 2017-present HaitaoWang555

| MCP:PMCFHr | 'use strict'
| MCP:PMCFHr | const path = require('path')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const defaultSettings = require('./src/settings.js')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const AutoImport = require('unplugin-auto-import/webpack')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const Components = require('unplugin-vue-components/webpack')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const { ElementPlusResolver } = require('unplugin-vue-components/resolvers')
| MCP:PMCFHr | function resolve(dir) {
| MCP:PMCFHr |   return path.join(__dirname, dir)
| MCP:PMCFHr | }
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | const name = defaultSettings.title || 'vue Admin Template' // page title
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | // If your port is set to 80,
| MCP:PMCFHr | // use administrator privileges to execute the command line.
| MCP:PMCFHr | // For example, Mac: sudo npm run
| MCP:PMCFHr | // You can change the port by the following methods:
| MCP:PMCFHr | // port = 9528 npm run dev OR npm run dev --port = 9528
| MCP:PMCFHr | const port = process.env.port || process.env.npm_config_port || 9528 // dev port
| MCP:PMCFHr | const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
| MCP:PMCFHr | // All configuration item explanations can be find in https://cli.vuejs.org/config/
| MCP:PMCFHr | module.exports = {
| MCP:PMCFHr |   /**
| MCP:PMCFHr |    * You will need to set publicPath if you plan to deploy your site under a sub path,
| MCP:PMCFHr |    * for example GitHub Pages. If you plan to deploy your site to https://foo.github.io/bar/,
| MCP:PMCFHr |    * then publicPath should be set to "/bar/".
| MCP:PMCFHr |    * In most cases please use '/' !!!
| MCP:PMCFHr |    * Detail: https://cli.vuejs.org/config/#publicpath
| MCP:PMCFHr |    */
| MCP:PMCFHr |   publicPath: isDev ? '/' : '/vue3-admin-template/',
| MCP:PMCFHr |   outputDir: 'dist',
| MCP:PMCFHr |   assetsDir: 'static',
| MCP:PMCFHr |   lintOnSave: isDev,
| MCP:PMCFHr |   productionSourceMap: true,
| MCP:PMCFHr |   css: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |     sourceMap: isDev,
| MCP:PMCFHr |   },
| MCP:PMCFHr |   devServer: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |     port: port,
| MCP:PMCFHr |     open: false,
| MCP:PMCFHr |     overlay: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |       warnings: false,
| MCP:PMCFHr |       errors: true,
| MCP:PMCFHr |     },
| MCP:PMCFHr |     before: require('./mock/mock-server.js'),
| MCP:PMCFHr |   },
| MCP:PMCFHr |   configureWebpack: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |     // provide the app's title in webpack's name field, so that
| MCP:PMCFHr |     // it can be accessed in index.html to inject the correct title.
| MCP:PMCFHr |     name: name,
| MCP:PMCFHr |     resolve: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |       alias: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |         '@': resolve('src'),
| MCP:PMCFHr |       },
| MCP:PMCFHr |     },
| MCP:PMCFHr |     plugins: [
| MCP:PMCFHr |       AutoImport({
| MCP:PMCFHr |         resolvers: [
| MCP:PMCFHr |           ElementPlusResolver({
| MCP:PMCFHr |             importStyle: false,
| MCP:PMCFHr |           }),
| MCP:PMCFHr |         ],
| MCP:PMCFHr |       }),
| MCP:PMCFHr |       Components({
| MCP:PMCFHr |         resolvers: [ElementPlusResolver()],
| MCP:PMCFHr |       }),
| MCP:PMCFHr |     ],
| MCP:PMCFHr |   },
| MCP:PMCFHr |   chainWebpack(config) {
| MCP:PMCFHr |     // it can improve the speed of the first screen, it is recommended to turn on preload
| MCP:PMCFHr |     config.plugin('preload').tap(() => [
| MCP:PMCFHr |       {
| MCP:PMCFHr |         rel: 'preload',
| MCP:PMCFHr |         // to ignore runtime.js
| MCP:PMCFHr |         // https://github.com/vuejs/vue-cli/blob/dev/packages/@vue/cli-service/lib/config/app.js#L171
| MCP:PMCFHr |         fileBlacklist: [/\.map$/, /hot-update\.js$/, /runtime\..*\.js$/],
| MCP:PMCFHr |         include: 'initial',
| MCP:PMCFHr |       },
| MCP:PMCFHr |     ])
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |     // when there are many pages, it will cause too many meaningless requests
| MCP:PMCFHr |     config.plugins.delete('prefetch')
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |     // set svg-sprite-loader
| MCP:PMCFHr |     config.module.rule('svg').exclude.add(resolve('src/icons')).end()
| MCP:PMCFHr |     config.module
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .rule('icons')
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .test(/\.svg$/)
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .include.add(resolve('src/icons'))
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .end()
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .use('svg-sprite-loader')
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .loader('svg-sprite-loader')
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .options({
| MCP:PMCFHr |         symbolId: 'icon-[name]',
| MCP:PMCFHr |       })
| MCP:PMCFHr |       .end()
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |     config.when(process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'development', (config) => {
| MCP:PMCFHr |       config
| MCP:PMCFHr |         .plugin('ScriptExtHtmlWebpackPlugin')
| MCP:PMCFHr |         .after('html')
| MCP:PMCFHr |         .use('script-ext-html-webpack-plugin', [
| MCP:PMCFHr |           {
| MCP:PMCFHr |             // `runtime` must same as runtimeChunk name. default is `runtime`
| MCP:PMCFHr |             inline: /runtime\..*\.js$/,
| MCP:PMCFHr |           },
| MCP:PMCFHr |         ])
| MCP:PMCFHr |         .end()
| MCP:PMCFHr |       config.optimization.splitChunks({
| MCP:PMCFHr |         chunks: 'all',
| MCP:PMCFHr |         cacheGroups: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |           libs: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |             name: 'chunk-libs',
| MCP:PMCFHr |             test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
| MCP:PMCFHr |             priority: 10,
| MCP:PMCFHr |             chunks: 'initial', // only package third parties that are initially dependent
| MCP:PMCFHr |           },
| MCP:PMCFHr |           elementUI: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |             name: 'chunk-elementPlus', // split elementUI into a single package
| MCP:PMCFHr |             priority: 20, // the weight needs to be larger than libs and app or it will be packaged into libs or app
| MCP:PMCFHr |             test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]_?element-plus(.*)|[\\/]node_modules[\\/]_?@element-plus(.*)/, // in order to adapt to cnpm
| MCP:PMCFHr |           },
| MCP:PMCFHr |           commons: {
| MCP:PMCFHr |             name: 'chunk-commons',
| MCP:PMCFHr |             test: resolve('src/components'), // can customize your rules
| MCP:PMCFHr |             minChunks: 3, //  minimum common number
| MCP:PMCFHr |             priority: 5,
| MCP:PMCFHr |             reuseExistingChunk: true,
| MCP:PMCFHr |           },
| MCP:PMCFHr |         },
| MCP:PMCFHr |       })
| MCP:PMCFHr |       // https:// webpack.js.org/configuration/optimization/#optimizationruntimechunk
| MCP:PMCFHr |       config.optimization.runtimeChunk('single')
| MCP:PMCFHr |     })
| MCP:PMCFHr |   },
| MCP:PMCFHr | }
| MCP:PMCFHr | successfully downloaded text file (SHA: de583d0940d6ec7a20f3b3a29172729e87173fcf)

| MCP:PMCFHr | # just a flag
| MCP:PMCFHr | ENV = 'development'
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # base api
| MCP:PMCFHr | VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/dev-api'
| MCP:PMCFHr | successfully downloaded text file (SHA: a8793a0989163f3c5258c47fb62f1c02ad08bc5a)

| MCP:PMCFHr | NODE_ENV = production
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # just a flag
| MCP:PMCFHr | ENV = 'staging'
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | # base api
| MCP:PMCFHr | VUE_APP_BASE_API = '/stage-api'
| MCP:PMCFHr |

| MCP:PMCFHr | const { run } = require('runjs')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const chalk = require('chalk')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const config = require('../vue.config.js')
| MCP:PMCFHr | const rawArgv = process.argv.slice(2)
| MCP:PMCFHr | const args = rawArgv.join(' ')
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr | if (process.env.npm_config_preview || rawArgv.includes('--preview')) {
| MCP:PMCFHr |   const report = rawArgv.includes('--report')
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   run(`vue-cli-service build ${args}`)
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   const port = 9526
| MCP:PMCFHr |   const publicPath = config.publicPath
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   var connect = require('connect')
| MCP:PMCFHr |   var serveStatic = require('serve-static')
| MCP:PMCFHr |   const app = connect()
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   app.use(
| MCP:PMCFHr |     publicPath,
| MCP:PMCFHr |     serveStatic('./dist', {
| MCP:PMCFHr |       index: ['index.html', '/']
| MCP:PMCFHr |     })
| MCP:PMCFHr |   )
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   app.listen(port, function () {
| MCP:PMCFHr |     console.log(chalk.green(`> Preview at  http://localhost:${port}${publicPath}`))
| MCP:PMCFHr |     if (report) {
| MCP:PMCFHr |       console.log(chalk.green(`> Report at  http://localhost:${port}${publicPath}report.html`))
| MCP:PMCFHr |     }
| MCP:PMCFHr | 
| MCP:PMCFHr |   })
| MCP:PMCFHr | } else {
| MCP:PMCFHr |   run(`vue-cli-service build ${args}`)
| MCP:PMCFHr | }

data.content:
Here's how to work with the **vue3-admin-template** app locally and for staging/production builds:

---

## Start the App Locally (Development)

1. **Install pnpm globally** (if not already installed):
   ```bash
   npm i -g pnpm
   ```

2. **Install dependencies**:
   ```bash
   pnpm install
   ```

3. **Run the dev server**:
   ```bash
   pnpm dev
   ```
   This starts the app on **http://localhost:9528** (configurable via `--port`). The dev environment uses mock data via `mock/mock-server.js` and proxies API calls to `/dev-api`.

---

## Build for Staging

```bash
pnpm build:stage
```

- Uses the `.env.staging` config (`NODE_ENV=production`, `ENV='staging'`, API base path `/stage-api`).
- Outputs production-optimized files to the `dist/` directory.

---

## Build for Production

```bash
pnpm build:prod
```

- Uses the `.env.production` config (`NODE_ENV=production`, `ENV='production'`, API base path `/prod-api`).
- Outputs production-optimized files to the `dist/` directory.

---

## Preview a Build Locally

```bash
pnpm preview
```

- First runs `vue-cli-service build`, then spins up a static server on **port 9526** serving the `dist/` folder at the configured `publicPath` (`/vue3-admin-template/`).
- Access the preview at: **http://localhost:9526/vue3-admin-template/**
- To include a bundle size report: `pnpm preview -- --report`

---

## Other Useful Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `pnpm lint` | Run ESLint code format check |
| `pnpm lint -- --fix` | Auto-fix lint issues |
| `pnpm svgo` | Optimize SVG icons in `src/icons/svg` |
